summary: The diff implements a frontend Admin Dashboard with Overview, User Management, Book Management, and Security sections, along with an AdminGuard component and admin theme tokens. However, it is missing the entire backend implementation (REQ-1), the Storage Control section (REQ-6), the Platform Settings section (REQ-7), the maintenance mode interstitial for non-admin users (REQ-7), and the announcement banner on the homepage (REQ-7). The Security section is also incomplete relative to REQ-8 (missing banned/suspended user list and activity log). The User Management section acknowledges a backend gap and returns an empty array.

missing_requirements.requirement: Extend the backend Motoko actor with all admin-only operations gated to the hardcoded admin principal, including getAllUsers, deleteUser, banUser, suspendUser, deleteAnyBook, approveBook, rejectBook, featureBook, getAllPDFs, deletePDF, getStorageStats, setMaxUploadSize, getPlatformSettings, setPlatformSettings, forceLogout, getAnalytics, and principal verification on all admin endpoints.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend/main.mo file appears in the diff at all. The frontend UserManagementSection explicitly comments that there is no getAllUsers endpoint and returns an empty array, confirming backend admin endpoints were not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement the Storage Control section showing aggregate storage usage, max upload size, a list of all uploaded PDF entries with metadata, a delete button per PDF, and a control to update the maximum allowed upload size.
missing_requirements.reason: No StorageControlSection component is added or referenced in the diff. The AdminDashboard only includes Overview, Users, Books, and Security sections.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement the Platform Settings section with an editable form for site name, logo URL, announcement banner text with toggle, and maintenance mode toggle, plus a maintenance-mode interstitial page for non-admin users and an announcement banner on the homepage.
missing_requirements.reason: No PlatformSettingsSection component is added or referenced. The AdminDashboard does not include a settings case in its renderSection switch. No maintenance-mode interstitial page or homepage announcement banner is present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Security section must display a list of currently banned and suspended users with unban/unsuspend actions, and a platform activity log showing at least 20 recent events with event type, principal, and timestamp.
missing_requirements.reason: The SecuritySection only shows a block-by-principal form. There is no banned/suspended users list with reversal actions and no activity log panel.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display most-active users by upload count in the Analytics/Overview section.
missing_requirements.reason: The OverviewSection shows most-viewed and most-bookmarked books but no most-active users list with display name and upload count is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: User table must show ban/unban AND suspend/unsuspend action buttons per row, and populate from the backend getAllUsers endpoint.
missing_requirements.reason: UserManagementSection returns an empty array due to the missing backend endpoint. There is no suspend/unsuspend action, only a restrict action via assignCallerUserRole.

missing_requirements.requirement: The admin upload form should reuse or mirror the existing Upload page form.
missing_requirements.reason: BookManagementSection uses an inline edit dialog rather than reusing or mirroring the existing Upload page form as required.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminSidebar only includes four navigation items (Overview, Users, Books, Security) omitting Storage Control and Platform Settings.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies six sections including Storage Control and Platform Settings, but these nav entries were not added.

hallucinated_features.description: SecuritySection queries pendingBooks from getPendingBooks which has no relevance to the Security section requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: The pendingBooks query appears to be a copy-paste artifact unrelated to the Security section's specified functionality.

hallucinated_features.description: SecuritySection calls assignCallerUserRole with UserRole.guest as the block mechanism instead of a dedicated banUser endpoint.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a banUser admin endpoint; using assignCallerUserRole is an unspecified workaround that was not requested.
